creator: s.moeding@ndh.net
text:
The format of the jargon file has changed from info files
	to HTML some time ago.  But the port COMMENT file still includes
	the term "info file format".

Fix: Apply the appended patch in /usr/ports/misc/jargon.


Stefan


How-To-Repeat: 
	cat /usr/ports/misc/jargon/pkg/COMMENT
